text:
PORTNAME=       proftpd
DISTVERSION=    1.3.1
PORTREVISION=   11
===========
if I set both
[X] CYRFIX           Patch to fix cyrillic encoding  
[X] CODECONV         Use charset conversion (mod_codeconv) 
I have:
make
